framework.name: VIC Card Enrollment via VTS + FIDO
framework.description: The agent demo shows a multi-step enrollment: card tokenization via Visa Token Service, device binding with FIDO authentication, step-up verification, Visa Payment Passkey creation, then VIC enrollment. This is a heavyweight onboarding flow.
framework.raw_quote: Card tokenization via VTS, Device binding with FIDO authentication, Step-up verification, Visa Payment Passkey creation, Assurance data collection and VIC enrollment

source.title: Visa Intelligent Commerce (VIC) - Integration Starter Kit
